notes: Collection-only post-close capture using the same-day official TWSE cash-session and institutional-flow snapshot.
This run intentionally did not generate daily_thesis, action_plan, watchlist strategy, or latest.json.

news_digest_context.primary_driver_summary: 截至本輪蒐集，市場 headline 同時受 AI 題材、伊朗和談進展、中東油價風險與聯準會人事聽證影響，沒有單一乾淨且壓倒性的主導消息。
notes: Used the target-date news_digest as the main narrative input, but normalized here only as background context.
No bullish/bearish trade conclusion is drawn from the digest in this collection layer.

trading_day_reference.description: 2026-04-21 is not listed as a TWSE holiday in the official 2026 schedule and is treated as a normal trading day.

market_structure_background.interpretation: The latest official cash session showed leadership concentrated in electronics, electronic parts/components, computer/peripheral equipment, communications/internet, and semiconductor-related groups, while finance, oil/gas/electricity, optoelectronics, and some defensive groups lagged.

market_driver_summary.background_mainline: Today's digest suggests no single clean macro headline dominated everything; the usable background is a mix of AI support, geopolitical/oil sensitivity, and rate-policy valuation pressure, anchored by a strong same-day Taiwan cash-session rebound.
market_driver_summary.official_cash_background: TAIEX closed at 37605.11 on 2026-04-21, up 646.31 points (+1.75%), with official sector leadership led by electronic parts/components, computer/peripheral equipment, communications/internet, electronics, and semiconductor-linked groups.
market_driver_summary.institutional_background: Official three-institution data showed foreign investors net bought NT$60,153,727,909, investment trusts net bought NT$8,059,253,703, dealers proprietary account net bought NT$591,045,960, dealers hedge account net sold NT$1,304,431,512, and total net buying reached NT$67,499,596,060.
tech_or_weight_groups: Communications / internet and AI-adjacent hardware supply-chain groups
lagging_groups: Selected defensive / consumer groups such as food and textile
data_gap_notes: This collection layer does not integrate live intraday Taiwan tape, FX, or structured US-yield snapshots.
Digest-derived drivers are kept as background-only context and are not converted into trading bias.

data_gaps.reason: No live Taiwan intraday collector was used in this collection run.
Structured FX snapshot is not integrated into this run.
Structured Treasury/yield snapshot is not integrated into this run.
This P0 job only builds market context background and stops before thesis/action-plan/watchlist output.

source_summary.name: TWSE MI_INDEX API (TAIEX close & sector indices)
